title: Distilling the Knowledge in a Neural Network
note: Introduces knowledge distillation as a model compression method.

title: DistilBERT, a distilled version of BERT: smaller, faster, cheaper and lighter
note: Applies distillation to transformer language models for cheaper inference.

title: LLM.int8(): 8-bit Matrix Multiplication for Transformers at Scale
note: Introduces an 8-bit inference method handling outlier features in large transformers.

title: SmoothQuant: Accurate and Efficient Post-Training Quantization for Large Language Models
note: Smooths activation outliers to enable efficient weight-activation quantization.

title: GPTQ: Accurate Post-Training Quantization for Generative Pre-trained Transformers
note: Uses second-order information for accurate post-training quantization.

title: To Prune, or Not to Prune: Exploring the Efficacy of Pruning for Model Compression
note: Studies pruning as a practical compression method.

title: A Review of Sparse Expert Models in Deep Learning
note: Surveys sparse expert models and the MoE design space.

title: Efficient Transformers: A Survey
note: Surveys architectural approaches to efficient transformer computation.
